name: Nodegroup
description: Nodegroup schema from Amazon EKS API

nodegroupName.description: The name of the managed node group.

nodegroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the managed node group.

clusterName.description: The name of the cluster the node group is associated with.

version.description: The Kubernetes version of the managed node group.

releaseVersion.description: The AMI version of the managed node group.

status.description: The current status of the managed node group.

capacityType.description: The capacity type of the managed node group.

instanceTypes.description: The instance types associated with the managed node group.

subnets.description: The subnets that were specified for the Auto Scaling group.

amiType.description: The AMI type associated with the managed node group.

nodeRole.description: The IAM role associated with the managed node group.

labels.description: The Kubernetes labels applied to the nodes in the node group.

tags.description: Metadata that assists with categorization and organization.

createdAt.description: The Unix epoch timestamp at object creation.

modifiedAt.description: The Unix epoch timestamp for the last modification.
